initiatives.name: Food Not Lawns Corvallis
initiatives.description: A grassroots initiative transforming lawns into sustainable food gardens, sharing resources, seeds, and knowledge while building food sovereignty through mutual aid networks in the Corvallis community.

initiatives.name: Corvallis Folk School Community Food Program
initiatives.description: Community-based organization offering food preservation workshops, community kitchen access, and skill-sharing programs to promote food security and self-sufficiency through mutual aid.

initiatives.name: Community Outreach Inc.
initiatives.description: Local organization providing emergency shelter, healthcare services, and support programs through mutual aid networks to assist community members experiencing homelessness or crisis.

initiatives.name: United Way of Benton & Lincoln Counties
initiatives.description: Coordinates mutual aid efforts and community resources to address housing insecurity, food access, and emergency assistance needs in the Corvallis area.

initiatives.name: Corvallis Mutual Aid Network
initiatives.description: Grassroots community network coordinating direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity actions to meet immediate needs of Corvallis residents through mutual aid principles.

initiatives.name: Corvallis Palestine Solidarity
initiatives.description: Corvallis Palestine Solidarity is a community in Corvallis, Oregon, working to promote awareness and engage the public in the campaign for justice, equality and human rights for the Palestinian people.

initiatives.name: Corvallis Daytime Drop-In Center
initiatives.description: The Corvallis Daytime Drop-in Center (CDDC) is a community-based resource hub providing information, referrals, and direct services for people experiencing homelessness and poverty in Benton County and beyond.

initiatives.name: Our Revolution Corvallis Allies
initiatives.description: To engage our community in local political action to create a society that works for everyone.

initiatives.name: Stop the Sweeps Corvallis Valley
initiatives.description: Corvallis, OR based mutual aid group
